Hospital.title: Hospital
Hospital.description: Represents a healthcare facility (Tenant) in the system.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user account. Document ID pattern: {hospitalId}_{email}. This enforces atomic uniqueness within a tenant and allows for O(1) direct lookups. Note: Changing an email requires re-keying the document (Copy-and-Delete pattern).

Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Stores demographic and clinical information for a patient within a hospital. Document ID pattern: {hospitalId}_MRN{mrn}. Includes normalized searchable fields for high-performance NoSQL indexing.

full_name_lowercase.description: Normalized name for case-insensitive prefix search.

phone_search.description: Normalized phone number (digits only) for exact/prefix search.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: A scheduled visit for a patient at a hospital.

Admission.title: Admission
Admission.description: Records an inpatient admission at a hospital.

Bed.title: Bed
Bed.description: Represents a physical bed in a hospital ward.

Referral.title: Referral
Referral.description: Incoming patient referral from another facility.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Financial document for services rendered to a patient.

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles. userId follows {hospitalId}_{email} pattern for atomic uniqueness and direct lookups.

/patients/{patientId}.description: Patient records. patientId follows {hospitalId}_MRN{mrn} pattern for unique identification and isolation.

/appointments/{appointmentId}.description: Appointment records with hospitalId field for logical isolation.

/admissions/{admissionId}.description: Admission records with hospitalId field for logical isolation.

/beds/{bedId}.description: Bed records with hospitalId field for logical isolation.

/referrals/{referralId}.description: Referral records with hospitalId field for logical isolation.

/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Invoice records with hospitalId field for logical isolation.
